action.reasoning: Observation: Eval continues to fail because evaluator hardcodes '/data/test_labels.txt' which doesn't exist. Predict.py now works (fallback to /rab_data/asvspoof2021_la_test). The evaluator bug is that it doesn't use the passed data_path, but hardcodes /data/test_labels.txt. Analysis: To make evaluator work, we must ensure /data directory exists and contains test_labels.txt. We need to check whether test_labels.txt exists in the actual test directory (/rab_data/asvspoof2021_la_test). If so, we can create a symlink from /data to that directory in predict.py. If not, the evaluator probably cannot run. Decision: List /rab_data/asvspoof2021_la_test to see if test_labels.txt exists; also test if we can create a symlink at /data. Then update predict.py to symlink /data if missing. Submit eval immediately to get test EER, which is critical before time runs out (1.4h left, no eval yet).
action.command: echo '--- Contents of /rab_data/asvspoof2021_la_test ---' && ls -la /rab_data/asvspoof2021_la_test/ && echo '--- Check if /data exists ---' && ls -ld /data 2>&1 || true && echo '--- Test symlink creation ---' && rm -f /data && ln -s /rab_data/asvspoof2021_la_test /data 2>&1 && ls -la /data/ && rm /data
